description: NFKC normalize, lower-case, collapse spaces, remove punctuation for dictionary matching.
Treat EQ TO, equivalent to/as and parenthetical salt/base descriptions as non-distinguishing matching text.
Map hydrochloride and hydrogen chloride to hcl, then compare both salt and salt-stripped variants.
Generate salt/base variants by removing known salt, hydrate, ester and phosphate tokens only for matching against an existing confirmed active dictionary.
Generate vitamin A and cyanocobalamin/Vit B12 variants when both names are present in existing official ingredient strings.
Do not auto-upgrade when any matched variant has confirmed preservative, vehicle, buffer, viscosity, chelator, surfactant, antioxidant, pH adjuster, ointment base, or other excipient evidence.
